channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US assures protection of commercial shipping in Strait of Hormuz amid tensions with Iran
item.description: The United States has stated that it is not seeking conflict over the Strait of Hormuz, but warned that any attack on commercial shipping will face a strong and devastating response. Pentagon chief Pe...

item.title: President Tinubu Nominates Tegbe and Umar for Key Federal Positions
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don formally write Senate make dem confirm Joseph Tegbe as Minister of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. The letter wey Senate President, Senator Godswill Akpabio, read for plenar...

item.title: Trump escalates threats towards Iran amid stalled diplomacy
item.description: Donald Trump’s recent threats to 'blow Iran off the face of the earth' highlight both his volatile rhetoric and the limited options available to his administration. Unlike other world leaders with nuc...

item.title: Lagos Safety Commission seals 12 buildings in Lekki and Ikeja over lift safety violations
item.description: The Lagos State Safety Commission don begin serious enforcement on buildings wey never comply with lift safety rules. As of May 4, 2026, twelve high-profile buildings for Lekki Phase 1 and Ikeja don d...

item.title: Tony Award nominations 2026 highlight veteran actors and top productions
item.description: The 2026 Tony Awards nominations have been announced, with notable records and achievements marking this year’s shortlist. 'The Lost Boys' and 'Schmigadoon!' each received twelve nominations, leading ...

item.title: Embracing Life and Confidence After Menopause
item.description: The article celebrates the joys and liberation of life for women in their 60s, particularly after menopause. The author shares her personal story of finding love and happiness later in life, recountin...

item.title: Assembly Election 2026 Results: Key Outcomes and Party Reactions in Assam, West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, and Puducherry
item.description: The 2026 Assembly elections across several Indian states have brought significant political changes. In West Bengal, TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee refused to resign despite her party's defeat, alleging ...

item.title: GTCO Festival Showcases Local and International Cuisine with Global Chefs
item.description: The 9th edition of the GTCO Food & Drink Festival waka Lagos from 1st to 3rd May, 2026, na serious platform wey dey support small businesses and celebrate food culture. The event hold for GTCentre, On...

item.title: Madlanga Commission hears updates on investigation into 541kg cocaine theft in KwaZulu-Natal
item.description: Nearly five years after a massive cocaine theft from a Hawks facility in KwaZulu-Natal, the Madlanga Commission has heard that the investigation is making meaningful progress. Major General Hendrick F...

item.title: Australia and Japan Strengthen Ties Through Energy, Defence and Critical Minerals Agreements
item.description: During Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's three-day visit to Australia, the two nations signed a broad set of agreements covering defence, critical minerals, energy security, and economic cooper...

item.title: Daughter Upset After Father Gives Deceased Mother's Necklace to Another Woman
item.description: A woman is grappling with feelings of betrayal after her father gave her late mother's cherished necklace to another woman who had been spending time with him while her mother was terminally ill. The ...

item.title: Senator Raffy Tulfo Confirms He Will Not Run for President or Vice President in 2028
item.description: Senator Raffy Tulfo has officially confirmed that he will not run for president in the 2028 Philippine elections, despite tying with Vice President Sara Duterte at 46 percent in a recent Pulse Asia su...

item.title: Viking hoard thief jailed for stabbing friend during argument over stolen gold
item.description: A metal detectorist who was previously convicted for his role in stealing part of a major Viking hoard worth £3 million has been sentenced for stabbing his friend during a dispute over stolen gold and...

item.title: Analysis: Why Chalmers’ proposed cash handout may offer little relief for homeowners
item.description: In the latest segment of 'Up Late,' Ben Harvey discusses the implications of Treasurer Jim Chalmers’ proposed cash handout, reportedly between $200 and $300 for every worker. While this move may sound...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Refuses to Step Down, Alleges Election Conspiracy in West Bengal
item.description: Following the results of the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, TMC chief and outgoing Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee categorically stated that she will not resign despite her party's defeat. Addres...

item.title: Zanzibar MPs urged to tackle rising living costs during budget session
item.description: As the 11th House of Representatives in Zanzibar starts its third meeting on May 6, 2026, the main focus is on the rising cost of living and the 2026/27 government budget. The session is planned to la...

item.title: Federal Housing Fund Faces Challenges in Enforcing Municipal Rezoning
item.description: The federal government of Canada launched the Housing Accelerator Fund to encourage cities to allow more multi-unit housing by providing financial incentives. Over 200 municipalities agreed to adjust ...

item.title: Affordable Fashion Picks to Transition from Spring to Summer
item.description: As the seasons shift from spring to summer, updating your wardrobe doesn’t have to come with a hefty price tag. The Curator highlights ten stylish, affordable pieces under $100 that are perfect for tr...

item.title: House of Representatives Passes National Land Use Act on Third and Final Reading
item.description: The House of Representatives has finally approved on third and final reading the long-awaited National Land Use Bill, ending years of delay in Congress. House Bill No. 8466 was passed with an overwhel...

item.title: Government Completes Review of Public Investment Bill and Plans Implementation
item.description: The Tanzanian government is in the final stages of revising the Public Investment Bill, which was first presented in Parliament in November 2023. After its initial reading and review by the Public Inv...
